back_translation: And the heads of the fathers of the clan of the sons of Gilead son of Machir son of Manasseh, of the clans of the sons of Joseph, drew near; and they spoke before Moses and before the leaders, heads of fathers of the sons of Israel.

And they said: 'My lord — the LORD commanded to give the land as an inheritance by lot to the sons of Israel; and my lord was commanded by the LORD to give the inheritance of Zelophehad our brother to his daughters.'

'And they shall become wives to one of the sons of the tribes of the sons of Israel; and their inheritance shall be subtracted from the inheritance of our fathers, and shall be added to the inheritance of the tribe to which they belong; and from the lot of our inheritance it shall be subtracted.'

'And if the Jubilee comes for the sons of Israel, their inheritance shall be added to the inheritance of the tribe to which they belong; and from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers their inheritance shall be subtracted.'
And Moses commanded the sons of Israel, by the mouth of the LORD, saying: 'Rightly does the tribe of the sons of Joseph speak.'

'This is the word which the LORD has commanded concerning the daughters of Zelophehad, saying: To the good in their eyes they shall become wives; only, to the clan of the tribe of their father they shall become wives.'
'And the inheritance shall not be turned around for the sons of Israel from tribe to tribe, for each man, in the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers, the sons of Israel shall cling.'

'And every daughter who possesses an inheritance from the tribes of the sons of Israel shall become a wife to one of the clan of the tribe of her father, so that the sons of Israel may possess each man the inheritance of his fathers.'
'And the inheritance shall not be turned around from one tribe to another tribe, for each in his inheritance shall cling — the tribes of the sons of Israel.'
As the LORD commanded Moses, so did the daughters of Zelophehad.
And Mahlah, Tirzah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, became wives to the sons of their uncles.
From the clans of the sons of Manasseh son of Joseph they became wives; and their inheritance remained on the tribe of the clan of their father.
These are the commandments and the ordinances which the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses to the sons of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho.
